title: [v5.0] Fix relabeling failures with Z/z volumes on Mac
body:
This is an automated cherry-pick of #22290

/assign n1hility

```release-note
Fixes EACCESS failures on Mac volumes when using Z/z options on a directory with read only files (#19852)
```

comments.body:
`# Error: creating build container: copying system image from manifest list: parsing image configuration: fetching blob: received unexpected HTTP status: 504 Gateway Time-out`

Network flakes, who could have guessed
